title: T-015 — IsAllRequiredFilled + Done_<Dept> + Status_Overall computed view
prompt:
# T-015 — IsAllRequiredFilled + Done flags + Status_Overall

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.10, §7.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Provide function isAllRequiredFilled(productCode, dept) and SQL view fa_status_overall computing Done_<Dept> per dept and 5-state Status_Overall enum (Built/Complete/Alert/InProgress/Pending).

## Implementation contract
Migration 0017 emits CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION is_all_required_filled(product_code TEXT, dept TEXT) RETURNS BOOLEAN reading Reference.DeptColumns required cols + product row. Plus VIEW fa_status_overall(product_code, tenant_id, done_core..done_procurement, status_overall, days_to_launch). Logic per §5.10 + §7.3. Use COALESCE for NULL handling.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0017_status_view.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/status-overall.test.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/queries/status-overall.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fa with all Core required cols filled and closed_core='Yes', when SELECT done_core FROM fa_status_overall, then done_core=TRUE
2. Given fa with launch_date 5 days from today and missing data, when SELECT status_overall, then it equals 'Alert'
3. Given fa with all 7 done flags TRUE and built=FALSE, when SELECT status_overall, then it equals 'Complete'

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 tests covering done_core, Alert, Complete states
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test status-overall'

## Risk red lines
- Do not persist days_to_launch (must be computed per Phase D #4)
- Do not include built FAs in InProgress
- Do not bypass RLS in view

pipeline_inputs.description: Function is_all_required_filled and view fa_status_overall computing Done flags + Status_Overall + days_to_launch.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0017 emits SQL function reading DeptColumns + product, plus VIEW joining product to fa_status_overall fields. Logic exactly per §5.10/§7.3.
